creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
Created attachment 246249
diff

Max version of setuptools-rust is hard coded when it really just needs to be over 1.3. Upstream engages in pointless tracking of the max current version of setuptools_rust. Doing so here just increases work with having to update that depend each time a new version of matrix-synapse comes out or setuptools-rust is released. Easiest just to drop the max version check.


https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/blob/develop/pyproject.toml
